raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Asserting a philosophical or spiritual claim about the exclusive purpose of suffering",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Suffering has a singular, purposeful use",
    "That use is exclusively purification by removing what is useless or impure",
    "Suffering is effective and supreme for achieving this purification"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent within a teleological framework but rests on unexamined metaphysical assumptions about purpose and value",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "When the recipient holds or benefits from a redemptive worldview in which attributing meaning to suffering aids coping, growth, or acceptance",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "When suffering lacks purifying outcomes, serves no singular purpose, or when the claim discourages efforts to reduce unnecessary suffering"
}
